history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be dangerous. The goal is at row 04 column D, and the safe route is to move down through the open cells. From facing right, I need to turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe, and moving forward progresses toward the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column B is safe, and moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead would be row 05 column B, which is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, and since I am facing down, I need to turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The next cell row 04 column C is lava, so I should not move forward into it. I need to reorient to avoid the lava and find another safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe, so moving forward brings me closer to the open area and toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 02 column B is safe, and moving there keeps me on a path around the lava while approaching the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up. The cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To continue toward the goal at row 04 column D, I should turn right to face the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I should turn right to face down, where the path below is safe and leads toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe and moves me closer to the goal region, so I should advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe, but from there the goal at row 04 column D is reachable by heading right. Since I can only move one step at a time, advancing is the best next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down, and the cell directly ahead is a wall boundary at row 05 column B. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, so I need to turn to face right before moving.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 04 column C is lava, so I cannot move forward. I should turn to avoid the lava and continue toward the goal at row 04 column D. Turning left will face me up, which is a safe direction to adjust from.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The goal is at row 04 column D, but moving forward would take me to row 03 column B, which is safe. From there I can work around the lava at column C. So the best next move is to go forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The goal is below and to the right at row 04 column D, but the direct path through column C on row 04 is lava. To route safely, I should turn right to face east so I can move toward the open cells on row 03.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
